title: Easter Pinball Machine for Kids, Large Pinball Game, Handheld Ball Design Game, Fun Holiday Party Gift & Egg Hunt Prize, Mini Arcade Travel Toy for Boys & Girls 3+ Years, Compact Size - 14cm
features: FUN & EDUCATIONAL EASTER TOY: This pinball puzzle game provides a screen-free sensory experience, helping kids develop reflexes, planning skills & coordination. A wonderful Easter gift for toddlers, boys & girls aged 3+ years.

EASTER HANDHELD PINBALL MACHINE: Enjoy endless fun with this mini pinball game, featuring 4 balls & a pull-back mechanism. A perfect Easter party favor, stocking filler & travel toy, keeping kids engaged with exciting arcade-style gameplay.

PERFECT PARTY BAG FILLER: Ideal for Easter gift bags, egg hunt prizes & kids’ party favors, this compact pinball machine is a fun alternative to traditional treats, offering an engaging handheld puzzle game for boys & girls.

DURABLE & CHILD-FRIENDLY DESIGN: Made from sturdy plastic, this handheld pinball game ensures long-lasting fun. Designed for enthusiastic kids, it enhances hand-eye coordination & problem-solving skills, making it a great Easter toy.

PORTABLE & COMPACT SIZE: Measuring 14x10.5x1 cm, this mini pinball machine is easy to carry, perfect for travel entertainment. Whether at home, on holiday, or during an Easter celebration, it's a great arcade game for kids.
description: SPECIFICATIONS:- Pattern: Easter Material: Plastic Quantity: 1 Piece Packaging: Blister Carded Packaged Weight: 0.080kg Product Dimensions: 14 x 10.5 x 1 cm (LxWxH) FEATURES:- A delightful Easter present that sparks joy and creativity. Made with non-toxic materials for hours of worry-free play. Simply plug it in, and the holiday-themed pinball adventure begins. Easily move it from the living room to the playroom for convenience. Develop hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills as children play. Our Easter Pinball Machine adds a magical touch to the holiday season. Each carton comes with three assorted designs: bunny, chick and lamb. This handheld pinball machine is a great toy for kids and a fun Easter gift.
